Appearances:
Plaintiff, Liana Tahir is present.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, James Belcher, is present.
Attorney, Kathleen McConnell, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
